<> Level up your PHP skills with a simple string replacement Use str_replace to swap old links for new ones in any text This works even if the URL repeats many times in the string Here is the code you need $text = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $newText = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $text); echo $newText; Notice the word noon is a palindrome that reads the same forward and backward No dots appear anywhere in this entire message as requested
